title: No Hidden Advancements
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that makes all hidden advancements visible in the UI
body:
Makes all hidden advancements visible in the UI:
  - "How Did We Get Here?"
  - "Voluntary Exile"
  - "Hero of the Village"
  - "Arbalistic"
  - "You've Got a Friend in Me"
  - "Smells Interesting"
  - "Birthday Song"
  - "Little Sniffs"
  - "Planting the Past"
